prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-UT12IPT-LG-BL-2 Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Universal Tool 12 Inch Low Profile Paper Trimmer with Guide Description: Ensure you get straight cuts during your crafting or DIY projects with the Universal Tool 12 Inch Paper Trimmer.

This trimmer is compact, lightweight and easy to transport. It can cut up to 4 sheets of paper at once, and features a magnetic cutting bar to hold the paper in place while you cut. Rubber stoppers are located on the base to prevent slippage, and it has a 6 x 21 square grid guide for use while cutting. Make sure you grab one of these to add to your tool collection. Search Terms: hand held office paper trimming device cutter crafting tools crafts scrapbook kids crafting home projects Features: - Universal Tool Paper Trimmer - 12" Length - Compact, Lightweight & Easy to Transport - Cuts Up to 4 Sheets At Once - Magnetic Cutting Bar To Hold Paper in Place - Rubber Stoppers On Base to Prevent Slippage === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 12 Inch Paper Trimmer with Guide

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 12-in Low Profile Paper Trimmer

anthropic.title_differentiation: Cuts 4 Sheets, Magnetic Bar, Grid Guide, Rubber Stoppers, Compact And Lightweight

openai.title_differentiation: Cuts 4 Sheets, Magnetic Cutting Bar, Rubber Stoppers, 6 X 21 Grid Guide, Compact Lightweight, Easy Transport
